examples.title: Harris Corner Detector
examples.code:
ALGORITHM HarrisCorner
BEGIN
  1. Compute image gradients Ix, Iy
  2. Create structure tensor M = [[Ix², IxIy], [IxIy, Iy²]]
  3. Compute R = det(M) - k*(trace(M))²
  4. Apply non-maximum suppression
  5. Threshold R to find corners
END
examples.explanation: Calculates corner response using structure tensor eigenvalues

examples.title: ORB Feature Matching
examples.code:
import cv2
orb = cv2.ORB_create()
kp1, des1 = orb.detectAndCompute(img1, None)
kp2, des2 = orb.detectAndCompute(img2, None)
bf = cv2.BFMatcher(cv2.NORM_HAMMING, crossCheck=True)
matches = bf.match(des1, des2)
examples.explanation: Implements ORB detector and brute-force matcher
